questions.statement:
Saina Nehwal confirmed her retirement from competitive badminton. In which year did she become the first Indian to win a BWF Super Series title by clinching the Indonesia Open?
साइना नेहवाल ने प्रतिस्पर्धी बैडमिंटन से संन्यास की पुष्टि की। उन्होंने किस वर्ष में इंडोनेशिया ओपन जीतकर BWF सुपर सीरीज का खिताब जीतने वाली पहली भारतीय बनीं?
Which organisation(s) are jointly involved in the Sentinel-6B ocean-tracking satellite mission?
options: NASA, NOAA, and the European Space Agency /

questions.statement: The Emerging Science &amp; Technology Innovation Conclave (ESTIC) 2025, India&rsquo;s flagship science and innovation conclave, was inaugurated by Prime Minister Narendra Modi on November 3, 2025, at Bharat Mandapam, New Delhi. What is the theme of ESTIC 2025?
options: Viksit Bharat 2047 &ndash; Pioneering Sustainable Innovation, Technological Advancement and Empowerment /
Science for Society: Driving Inclusive Growth /
Building a Future through Science, Technology &amp; Innovation /

questions.statement:
Which organization has inaugurated the 9th T20 National Cricket Championship for Deaf 2025 in New Delhi?
किस संगठन ने नई दिल्ली में 9वीं टी20 राष्ट्रीय क्रिकेट चैम्पियनशिप फॉर डेफ 2025 का उद्घाटन किया?
options: Indian Deaf Cricket Association / इंडियन डेफ क्रिकेट एसोसिएशन
Paralympic Committee of India / पैरालंपिक कमेटी ऑफ इंडिया
Special Olympics Bharat / स्पेशल ओलंपिक्स भारत

questions.statement: India achieved a major renewable energy milestone in 2025. Approximately how much renewable energy capacity did India add during the year?
